2026-06-07 - shared vector math cleanup

bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs
- Removed line: function add(a, b) {
  Reason: local vector addition duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.add.
- Removed line:   return a.map((value, index) => value + b[index]);
  Reason: local vector addition duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.add.
- Removed line: }
  Reason: removed closing brace for deleted duplicate add helper.
- Removed line: function sub(a, b) {
  Reason: local vector subtraction duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.sub.
- Removed line:   return a.map((value, index) => value - b[index]);
  Reason: local vector subtraction duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.sub.
- Removed line: }
  Reason: removed closing brace for deleted duplicate sub helper.
- Removed line: function mul(a, scalar) {
  Reason: local vector scalar multiplication duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.mul.
- Removed line:   return a.map((value) => value * scalar);
  Reason: local vector scalar multiplication duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.mul.
- Removed line: }
  Reason: removed closing brace for deleted duplicate mul helper.
- Removed line: function dot(a, b) {
  Reason: local dot product duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.dot.
- Removed line:   return a.reduce((sum, value, index) => sum + value * b[index], 0);
  Reason: local dot product duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.dot.
- Removed line: }
  Reason: removed closing brace for deleted duplicate dot helper.
- Removed line: function len(a) {
  Reason: local vector length duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.len.
- Removed line:   return Math.hypot(...a);
  Reason: local vector length duplicated engine/core/math.mjs; viewer now uses shared v.len.
- Removed line: }
  Reason: removed closing brace for deleted duplicate len helper.
- Removed line: function norm(a) {
  Reason: local normalized-vector-with-fallback behavior is now centralized as v.safeNorm.
- Removed line:   const length = len(a);
  Reason: local normalization length calculation duplicated centralized v.safeNorm.
- Removed line:   return length > 1e-9 ? mul(a, 1 / length) : [0, 0, 1];
  Reason: local normalization fallback duplicated centralized v.safeNorm with explicit fallback.
- Removed line: }
  Reason: removed closing brace for deleted duplicate norm helper.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`

  - Reason: vector filtering is handled by shared `averageVec3`.

  - Removed/replaced: `if (!valid.length) return null;`
  - Reason: empty-vector fallback is handled by shared `averageVec3`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return valid.reduce((sum, point) => add(sum, point), [0, 0, 0]).map((value) => value / valid.length);`
  - Reason: vector summing and division are handled by shared `averageVec3`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed local `averagePoints` helper.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return averagePoints(centers);`
  - Reason: weld center averaging now uses shared `averageVec3`.

  - Removed/replaced: `center: averagePoints(points)`
  - Reason: QA target center averaging now uses shared `averageVec3`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { bounds3, bounds3Corners, clamp, finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr, finitePositiveNumber, finitePositiveNumberOr, validVec3Points, v } from "../../engine/core/math.mjs?v=number-or-dry-2";`
  - Reason: scene building now imports shared `averageVec3` instead of open-coding vector averaging.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!points.length) geometryError("cannot average empty point set");`
  - Reason: empty average handling is now expressed as shared `averageVec3(...) || geometryError(...)`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return v.mul(points.reduce((sum, point) => v.add(sum, point), [0, 0, 0]), 1 / points.length);`
  - Reason: vector summing and scaling are handled by shared `averageVec3`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function averagePoints(points) {`
  - Reason: the remaining wrapper around `averageVec3` had only one caller and added no abstraction value.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return averageVec3(points) || geometryError("cannot average empty point set");`
  - Reason: the single caller now invokes shared `averageVec3` directly with the same error fallback.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed one-call `averagePoints` wrapper.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return averagePoints(points);`
  - Reason: trim joint point resolution now calls shared `averageVec3` directly, removing the one-call wrapper.

  - Removed/replaced: `function closestAxisPoints(left, right) {`

  - Removed/replaced: `const a0 = left.a;`
  - Reason: axis endpoint extraction is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

  - Removed/replaced: `const b0 = right.a;`
  - Reason: axis endpoint extraction is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const ad = v.norm(v.sub(left.b, left.a));`
  - Reason: axis direction normalization is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const bd = v.norm(v.sub(right.b, right.a));`
  - Reason: axis direction normalization is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const r = v.sub(a0, b0);`
  - Reason: closest-axis delta calculation is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const dot = v.dot(ad, bd);`
  - Reason: closest-axis dot calculation is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const c = v.dot(ad, r);`
  - Reason: closest-axis projection calculation is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const f = v.dot(bd, r);`
  - Reason: closest-axis projection calculation is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const denominator = 1 - dot * dot;`
  - Reason: closest-axis denominator calculation is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const s = Math.abs(denominator) <= 1e-9 ? 0 : (dot * f - c) / denominator;`
  - Reason: closest-axis parallel fallback and station calculation are handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const t = Math.abs(denominator) <= 1e-9 ? f : (f - dot * c) / denominator;`
  - Reason: closest-axis parallel fallback and station calculation are handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const pointA = v.add(a0, v.mul(ad, s));`
  - Reason: closest-axis point construction is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const pointB = v.add(b0, v.mul(bd, t));`
  - Reason: closest-axis point construction is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return { pointA, pointB, distance: v.len(v.sub(pointA, pointB)) };`
  - Reason: closest-axis result construction is handled by shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed local `closestAxisPoints` helper.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`

  - Removed/replaced: `const map = new Map();`
  - Reason: local parser allocation disappeared with the duplicate parser.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (typeof regionKey !== "string" || !regionKey) geometryError("plane trim region key must be a non-empty string");`
  - Reason: renderer still validates the input key, but parsing details now come from the shared helper.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `for (const part of regionKey.split("|")) {`
  - Reason: local split loop disappeared with the duplicate parser.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const index = part.lastIndexOf(":");`
  - Reason: separator handling now lives in the shared trim-region parser.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (index <= 0) geometryError(\`invalid plane trim region key: ${regionKey}\`);`
  - Reason: malformed key handling now comes from the shared parser.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const planeId = part.slice(0, index);`
  - Reason: plane ID extraction is centralized in `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const side = part.slice(index + 1);`
  - Reason: side extraction is centralized in `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

  - Removed/replaced: `if (side !== "+" && side !== "-") geometryError(\`invalid plane trim region side in key: ${regionKey}\`);`

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (map.has(planeId)) geometryError(\`duplicate plane in trim region key: ${regionKey}\`);`
  - Reason: duplicate plane validation is no longer duplicated in the renderer.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `map.set(planeId, side);`
  - Reason: local parser map population disappeared with the duplicate parser.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing braces belonged to the removed local parser and wrapper helpers.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return map;`
  - Reason: local parser return disappeared with the duplicate parser.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function trimRegionKeysForPlanes(planes) {`
  - Reason: removed thin local wrapper around `planeTrimRegionKeys`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return planeTrimRegionKeys(planes.map((plane) => plane.id));`
  - Reason: call site now maps plane IDs directly before invoking the shared key generator.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`

  - Reason: region sign lookup now uses the shared `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

## Project Store Trim Region Parser Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function trimRegionParts(regionKey) {`
  - Reason: removed duplicate plane-trim region parser; store validation now uses the shared model trim-region parser.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (typeof regionKey !== "string" || !regionKey) fail("plane trim region key must be a non-empty string");`
  - Reason: the validation remains at the call site, but the removed helper no longer owns this check separately.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return regionKey.split("|").map((part) => {`
  - Reason: local region-key split loop was replaced by `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const index = part.lastIndexOf(":");`
  - Reason: separator parsing is centralized in `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (index <= 0) fail(\`invalid plane trim region key: ${regionKey}\`);`
  - Reason: invalid key structure is detected by comparing shared parser output to raw parts.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const planeId = part.slice(0, index);`
  - Reason: plane ID extraction is centralized in `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const side = part.slice(index + 1);`
  - Reason: side extraction is centralized in `trimRegionSelectorMap`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (side !== "+" && side !== "-") fail(\`invalid plane trim region side in key: ${regionKey}\`);`
  - Reason: side validation now comes from shared parser result consistency instead of a duplicate branch.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return { planeId, side };`
  - Reason: local parsed part objects are replaced by iterating the shared selector map keys.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `});`
  - Reason: closed the removed duplicate parser loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed `trimRegionParts` helper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const parts = trimRegionParts(regionKey);`
  - Reason: validation now calls `trimRegionSelectorMap` directly.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (parts.length !== planeIds.size) fail(\`${trimJointId}: plane trim region key must include every selected plane\`);`
  - Reason: selected-plane count is checked against the shared selector map size.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const seen = new Set();`
  - Reason: duplicate detection is folded into the shared parser size check.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `for (const { planeId } of parts) {`
  - Reason: validation now iterates shared selector keys.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (seen.has(planeId)) fail(\`${trimJointId}: plane trim region repeats plane: ${planeId}\`);`
  - Reason: repeated planes now fail through the raw-part count versus selector-size check.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `seen.add(planeId);`
  - Reason: explicit seen-set tracking is no longer needed.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { createProjectStore } from "../../engine/store/project-store.mjs?v=plate-accessors-dry-1";`
  - Reason: bumped project-store import so local reloads pick up shared trim-region parser validation.

## Polygon Area Helper Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `let area = 0;`
  - Reason: model geometry outline area now uses shared `signedArea2d`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `for (let index = 0; index < points.length; index += 1) {`
  - Reason: duplicate shoelace loop was replaced by shared `signedArea2d`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const a = points[index];`
  - Reason: point extraction belonged to the removed duplicate shoelace loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const b = points[(index + 1) % points.length];`
  - Reason: next-point extraction belonged to the removed duplicate shoelace loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `area += a[0] * b[1] - b[0] * a[1];`
  - Reason: polygon cross-product sum is centralized in `signedArea2d`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed duplicate shoelace loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return Math.abs(area) / 2;`
  - Reason: absolute polygon area now comes from `Math.abs(signedArea2d(points))`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function polygonArea(points = []) {`
  - Reason: sectioning no longer owns a local polygon-area helper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!Array.isArray(points) || points.length < 3) return 0;`
  - Reason: plate area now performs its guard at the call site before using `signedArea2d`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `let area = 0;`
  - Reason: duplicate shoelace loop was replaced by shared `signedArea2d`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `for (let index = 0; index < points.length; index += 1) {`
  - Reason: duplicate shoelace loop was replaced by shared `signedArea2d`.

  - Removed/replaced: `const a = points[index];`
  - Reason: point extraction belonged to the removed duplicate shoelace loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const b = points[(index + 1) % points.length];`
  - Reason: next-point extraction belonged to the removed duplicate shoelace loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `area += a[0] * b[1] - b[0] * a[1];`
  - Reason: polygon cross-product sum is centralized in `signedArea2d`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed duplicate shoelace loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return Math.abs(area) / 2;`
  - Reason: absolute polygon area now comes from `Math.abs(signedArea2d(outline))`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed local `polygonArea` helper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return polygonArea(plateOutline(plate));`
  - Reason: plate area now calls the shared signed-area helper directly.

  - Reason: CSG now imports shared `signedArea2d` together with triangulation.

  - Removed/replaced: `function polygonArea2d(points) {`
  - Reason: removed local CSG polygon-area helper.

  - Reason: duplicate shoelace loop was replaced by shared `signedArea2d`.

  - Reason: duplicate shoelace loop was replaced by shared `signedArea2d`.

  - Reason: axis point construction now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed local `axisPoint`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function projectAxisStation(axis, point) {`
  - Reason: station projection on an axis segment now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return v.dot(v.sub(point, axis.start), axis.x);`
  - Reason: axis station projection now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed local `projectAxisStation`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function closestSegmentPoints(axisA, axisB) {`
  - Reason: removed renderer-local closest segment algorithm; shared math API now owns it.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const candidates = [];`
  - Reason: closest segment candidate collection now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const addCandidate = (stationA, stationB) => {`
  - Reason: candidate construction now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const a = axisPoint(axisA, clamp(stationA, 0, axisA.length));`
  - Reason: clamped axis A point construction now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const b = axisPoint(axisB, clamp(stationB, 0, axisB.length));`
  - Reason: clamped axis B point construction now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `candidates.push({ a, b, distance: v.len(v.sub(a, b)) });`
  - Reason: candidate distance calculation now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `};`
  - Reason: local candidate helper closing line was removed with the renderer-local algorithm.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const delta = v.sub(axisA.start, axisB.start);`
  - Reason: axis delta calculation now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const axisDot = v.dot(axisA.x, axisB.x);`
  - Reason: axis dot calculation now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const aDelta = v.dot(axisA.x, delta);`
  - Reason: axis A delta projection now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const bDelta = v.dot(axisB.x, delta);`
  - Reason: axis B delta projection now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const denominator = 1 - axisDot * axisDot;`
  - Reason: closest-axis denominator calculation now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (Math.abs(denominator) > CSG_EPSILON) {`
  - Reason: parallel-axis guard now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const stationA = (axisDot * bDelta - aDelta) / denominator;`
  - Reason: unconstrained closest station solve now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `addCandidate(stationA, bDelta + axisDot * stationA);`
  - Reason: closest infinite-axis candidate now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed local non-parallel candidate branch.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `addCandidate(0, projectAxisStation(axisB, axisA.start));`
  - Reason: segment endpoint fallback candidate now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `addCandidate(axisA.length, projectAxisStation(axisB, axisPoint(axisA, axisA.length)));`
  - Reason: axis A far-end fallback candidate now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `addCandidate(projectAxisStation(axisA, axisB.start), 0);`
  - Reason: axis B start fallback candidate now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `addCandidate(projectAxisStation(axisA, axisPoint(axisB, axisB.length)), axisB.length);`
  - Reason: axis B far-end fallback candidate now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return candidates.sort((a, b) => a.distance - b.distance)[0] || null;`
  - Reason: closest candidate selection now lives in shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed renderer-local `closestSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const closest = closestSegmentPoints(axes[i], axes[j]);`
  - Reason: trim joint point resolution now calls shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { buildScene } from "../../rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs?v=member-end-point-dry-1";`
  - Reason: bumped scene builder import so local reloads use shared axis segment closest-point math.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/index.html`
  - Removed/replaced: `<script type="module" src="./main.mjs?v=member-station-api-dry-1"></script>`
  - Reason: bumped viewer entry cache key so local reloads use shared axis segment closest-point math.

## Snap Composer Closest Axis Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `export function closestAxisPoints(left, right, epsilon = 1e-9) {`
  - Reason: shared closest-axis helper now accepts options so callers can preserve parallel-axis behavior explicitly.

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const a0 = left.a;`
  - Reason: shared closest-axis helper now supports both `{ a, b }` and `{ origin, direction }` axis shapes.

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const b0 = right.a;`
  - Reason: shared closest-axis helper now resolves the right axis origin through a common axis accessor.

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const ad = v.norm(v.sub(left.b, left.a));`
  - Reason: shared closest-axis helper now accepts pre-normalized directional axes from snap composer.

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const bd = v.norm(v.sub(right.b, right.a));`
  - Reason: shared closest-axis helper now accepts pre-normalized directional axes from snap composer.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { finiteNumberOr, v } from "../../core/math.mjs?v=number-or-dry-1";`
  - Reason: snap composer now imports shared `closestAxisPoints` instead of defining a local copy.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function closestAxisPoints(left, right) {`
  - Reason: removed snap-composer-local closest-axis solver; shared math API now owns the rule.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const r = v.sub(left.origin, right.origin);`
  - Reason: origin delta calculation now lives in shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const dot = v.dot(left.direction, right.direction);`
  - Reason: axis dot calculation now lives in shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const c = v.dot(left.direction, r);`
  - Reason: left-axis delta projection now lives in shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const f = v.dot(right.direction, r);`
  - Reason: right-axis delta projection now lives in shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const denominator = 1 - dot * dot;`
  - Reason: closest-axis denominator calculation now lives in shared math API.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (Math.abs(denominator) <= EPSILON) return null;`
  - Reason: snap composer's parallel-axis skip is now expressed as `{ parallel: "null" }` on the shared helper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const leftPoint = v.add(left.origin, v.mul(left.direction, (dot * f - c) / denominator));`
  - Reason: left closest point solve now lives in shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const rightPoint = v.add(right.origin, v.mul(right.direction, (f - dot * c) / denominator));`
  - Reason: right closest point solve now lives in shared `closestAxisPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return { leftPoint, rightPoint };`
  - Reason: closest point result now uses the shared `{ pointA, pointB, distance }` shape.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed snap-composer-local closest-axis solver.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const closest = closestAxisPoints(constructionAxis, memberAxis);`
  - Reason: snap composer now calls the shared closest-axis solver with explicit parallel-axis null behavior.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const point = closest.leftPoint;`
  - Reason: snap composer now reads the shared result field `pointA`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: ``const guide = guideLine(closest.rightPoint, point, `${axisSource.label || "Member axis"} projection`);``
  - Reason: snap composer now reads the shared result field `pointB`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-solver.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { closestAxisPoints, finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr, v } from "../../core/math.mjs?v=closest-axis-dry-1";`
  - Reason: bumped snap solver math import so it uses the extended shared closest-axis helper.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/interaction/member-edit-controller.mjs`

## Sectioning Object Lookup Cleanup

  - Reason: removed sectioning-local object lookup wrapper; core model API now owns effective object lookup.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`

  - Reason: collection lookup is now performed directly in `estimateObject` before calling shared `objectById`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return collection ? { collection, object: project.model[collection][objectId] } : null;`
  - Reason: local raw object wrapper was replaced by shared effective-object lookup plus explicit collection metadata.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed sectioning-local object lookup wrapper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const entry = objectById(project, objectId);`
  - Reason: `estimateObject` now resolves collection and effective object as separate shared API calls.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!entry) fail(`object not found: ${objectId}`);`
  - Reason: missing object detection now checks shared `objectCollection`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const weightKg = entry.collection === "members"`
  - Reason: weight routing now uses the explicit `collection` value from project object API.

  - Reason: member weight now receives the shared effective object.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `: entry.collection === "plates" ? plateWeightKg(entry.object, libraries)`
  - Reason: plate weight now receives the shared effective object and explicit collection check.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `collection: entry.collection,`
  - Reason: section estimate now reports the explicit collection resolved through project object API.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `type: entry.object.type,`
  - Reason: section estimate now reads type from the shared effective object.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/sectioning.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `bounds: boundsForPoints(objectPoints(entry.object, entry.collection))`
  - Reason: bounds now use the shared effective object and explicit collection metadata.

## Plate Sketch Loop API Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const vertices = sketchVertices(sketch);`
  - Reason: outline extraction now uses shared `orderedSketchLoop`, so sketch vertex ordering is defined once in the plate project API.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const edges = sketchEdges(sketch);`
  - Reason: edge traversal now lives in shared `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const vertexMap = new Map(vertices.map((vertex) => [vertex.id, vec2(vertex.point, `plate sketch vertex ${vertex.id}`)]));`
  - Reason: vertex point map creation is now shared through `sketchVertexPointMap`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (vertexMap.size < 3) fail("plate sketch requires at least three vertices");`
  - Reason: vertex count validation moved into shared sketch-loop API.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!edges.length) return vertices.map((vertex) => vertexMap.get(vertex.id));`
  - Reason: no-edge sketch fallback is now handled by `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const edgeMap = new Map(edges.map((edge) => [edge.from, edge]));`
  - Reason: sketch edge traversal map is now built only inside `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const firstEdge = edges[0];`
  - Reason: first-edge traversal state is now encapsulated in the shared loop helper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const outline = [];`
  - Reason: outline points now come from `orderedSketchLoop(...).map((item) => item.point)`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const seenEdges = new Set();`
  - Reason: closed-loop duplicate edge detection is now part of shared loop traversal.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `let current = firstEdge.from;`
  - Reason: current vertex traversal state moved to `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `for (let guard = 0; guard <= edges.length; guard += 1) {`
  - Reason: guarded sketch traversal is now shared instead of local to outline extraction.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const edge = edgeMap.get(current);`
  - Reason: edge lookup moved to shared traversal.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!edge || seenEdges.has(edge.id)) break;`
  - Reason: invalid/open-loop detection now belongs to `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `seenEdges.add(edge.id);`
  - Reason: duplicate-edge tracking moved to shared traversal.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `outline.push(vertexMap.get(edge.from));`
  - Reason: loop points are now returned by shared `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `current = edge.to;`
  - Reason: current edge advancement moved to shared traversal.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (current === firstEdge.from) break;`
  - Reason: loop closure handling moved to shared traversal.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: closing brace belonged to the removed local outline traversal loop.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (outline.length !== edges.length || current !== firstEdge.from) fail("plate sketch edges must form one closed loop");`
  - Reason: closed-loop validation moved to shared `orderedSketchLoop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return cleanOutline(outline);`
  - Reason: outline extraction now cleans points returned by shared loop traversal.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/plate-bend-geometry.mjs`

  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed local `sketchEdge` helper.

  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed local layout-axis helper.

  - Reason: closest-axis input now uses a normalized axis segment before calling shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

  - Reason: local axis vector calculation was replaced by shared axis-segment closest-point solving.

  - Reason: axis length now comes from the reusable axis segment object.

  - Reason: secondary axis length now comes from the reusable axis segment object.

  - Removed/replaced: `if (bLength <= AXIS_EPSILON) fail(`${secondary.id}: zero-length layout axis`);`
  - Reason: zero-length validation moved into the reusable axis segment builder.

  - Reason: axis unit direction now lives on the reusable axis segment object.

  - Removed/replaced: `const d2 = v.mul(w, 1 / bLength);`
  - Reason: secondary axis unit direction now lives on the reusable axis segment object.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const r = v.sub(a.start, b.start);`
  - Reason: raw closest-line vector math was replaced by shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const dot = v.dot(d1, d2);`
  - Reason: axis dot product is now computed once inside shared closest-axis math.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const denom = 1 - dot * dot;`
  - Reason: closest-axis denominator handling is now centralized in shared math.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `let stationA;`
  - Reason: station result is now derived from returned closest points instead of manual branch state.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `let stationB;`
  - Reason: station result is now derived from returned closest points instead of manual branch state.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (Math.abs(denom) <= AXIS_EPSILON) {`
  - Reason: parallel-axis branch is now handled by shared segment closest-point logic.

  - Removed/replaced: `stationA = stationOnLine(b.start, a);`
  - Reason: parallel-axis stationing no longer needs a custom branch in the generator.

  - Reason: parallel-axis stationing no longer needs a custom branch in the generator.

  - Reason: non-parallel branch was removed in favor of shared closest-axis solving.

  - Removed/replaced: `stationA = (dot * v.dot(d2, r) - v.dot(d1, r)) / denom;`
  - Reason: bespoke closest-line station equation was replaced by shared math.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `stationB = (v.dot(d2, r) - dot * v.dot(d1, r)) / denom;`

  - Reason: closing brace belonged to removed closest-axis branch.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`

  - Reason: segment clamping now happens inside shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `stationB = clamp(stationB, 0, bLength);`
  - Reason: segment clamping now happens inside shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

  - Reason: closest point A now comes from shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const pointB = v.add(b.start, v.mul(d2, stationB));`
  - Reason: closest point B now comes from shared `closestAxisSegmentPoints`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/modules/smart-components/smart-component-generator.mjs`

  - Reason: zero-length member rejection now uses the length already validated by shared `memberAxisData`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const direction = v.mul(axis, 1 / length);`
  - Reason: normalized member direction now comes from shared `memberAxisData`.

  - Removed/replaced: `return iface.memberEnd === "end" ? v.mul(direction, -1) : direction;`

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`

  - Reason: generated smart component trim fitting now gets member axis start, direction, and length from shared `memberAxisData`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const denominator = v.dot(normal, axis);`
  - Reason: trim-plane intersection still uses the full axis vector, but that vector is reconstructed from shared `memberAxisData` rather than local endpoint subtraction.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`

  - Reason: trim fitting now uses `memberAxisData.start`, keeping all member axis geometry sourced from one API.

## Average Vec3 Centroid Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { clamp, finiteNonNegativeNumber, finiteNumber, finitePositiveNumber, finiteVec3, v } from "../core/math.mjs?v=store-number-dry-1";`
  - Reason: project-store now imports the shared `averageVec3` helper instead of hand-rolling a trim-joint reference centroid.

- `bobercad/app/engine/store/project-store.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return v.mul(points.reduce((sum, point) => v.add(sum, point), [0, 0, 0]), 1 / points.length);`
  - Reason: replaced local centroid math with `averageVec3(points, [0, 0, 0])`, centralizing valid vec3 filtering and fallback behavior.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const origin = v.mul(planes.reduce((sum, plane) => v.add(sum, requiredVector(plane, "origin", "trim operation marker")), [0, 0, 0]), 1 / planes.length);`
  - Reason: operation callout plane centroid now uses `averageVec3`, avoiding duplicate reduce/divide vector math.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const centroid = v.mul(points.reduce((sum, point) => v.add(sum, point), [0, 0, 0]), 1 / points.length);`
  - Reason: clipped plate support-edge centroid now uses the shared `averageVec3` helper.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { boundsYz, distance3, finiteNumber, linePlaneIntersection, projectPointToPlane, v } from "../../engine/core/math.mjs?v=distance3-dry-1";`
  - Reason: dimension-context now imports `averageVec3` for shared plate support-edge centroid logic.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const centroid = v.mul(points.reduce((sum, point) => v.add(sum, point), [0, 0, 0]), 1 / points.length);`
  - Reason: annotation support-edge centroid now uses `averageVec3(points, plate.center)` instead of duplicate reduce/divide math.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/build-dimensions.mjs`

  - Reason: bumped the weld-size dimension import so weld placement uses the shared centroid helper.

## Clean Vec2 Loop DRY Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr, finitePositiveNumber, finiteVec3, v } from "../../core/math.mjs?v=number-or-dry-1";`
  - Reason: plate API now reuses shared `cleanVec2Loop` for sketch outline normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const clean = [];`
  - Reason: local outline collection was replaced by shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `for (const point of outline || []) {`
  - Reason: local outline iteration was replaced by shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const next = vec2(point, "plate outline point");`
  - Reason: strict point validation now happens through shared `cleanVec2Loop` and `finiteVec2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const previous = clean[clean.length - 1];`
  - Reason: duplicate-point comparison now happens in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!previous || Math.hypot(previous[0] - next[0], previous[1] - next[1]) > EPSILON) clean.push(next);`
  - Reason: consecutive duplicate removal now happens in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: removed the local outline iteration block.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (clean.length > 1) {`
  - Reason: closing duplicate-point check now happens in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const first = clean[0];`
  - Reason: closing duplicate-point check now happens in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const last = clean[clean.length - 1];`
  - Reason: closing duplicate-point check now happens in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (Math.hypot(first[0] - last[0], first[1] - last[1]) <= EPSILON) clean.pop();`
  - Reason: final closing point removal now happens in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: removed the local closing duplicate check block.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (clean.length < 3) fail("plate sketch requires at least three distinct points");`
  - Reason: minimum distinct point validation now uses the `minPoints` option in shared `cleanVec2Loop`.

  - Reason: `cleanOutline` now returns the shared helper result directly.

## Distance2 Segment Helper Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (!previous || Math.hypot(previous[0] - next[0], previous[1] - next[1]) > tolerance) clean.push(next);`
  - Reason: `cleanVec2Loop` now uses shared `distance2`, keeping 2D distance math behind one helper.

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/math.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (Math.hypot(first[0] - last[0], first[1] - last[1]) <= tolerance) clean.pop();`
  - Reason: closing-point distance comparison now uses shared `distance2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { cleanVec2Loop, clamp, finitePositiveNumber as finitePositive, linePlaneIntersection, projectedAxis, projectPointToPlane, v } from "../../core/math.mjs?v=clean-vec2-loop-dry-1";`
  - Reason: model geometry now imports shared `distancePointToSegment2`, so the local segment-distance implementation can be removed.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `function pointSegmentDistance(point, a, b) {`
  - Reason: local 2D segment-distance helper was replaced by shared `distancePointToSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const ab = [b[0] - a[0], b[1] - a[1]];`
  - Reason: 2D segment vector calculation now lives in shared `closestPointOnSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const lengthSq = ab[0] * ab[0] + ab[1] * ab[1];`
  - Reason: segment length calculation now lives in shared `closestPointOnSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const t = lengthSq <= EPSILON ? 0 : clamp(((point[0] - a[0]) * ab[0] + (point[1] - a[1]) * ab[1]) / lengthSq, 0, 1);`
  - Reason: clamped segment projection now lives in shared `closestPointOnSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const closest = [a[0] + ab[0] * t, a[1] + ab[1] * t];`
  - Reason: closest point creation now lives in shared `closestPointOnSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return Math.hypot(point[0] - closest[0], point[1] - closest[1]);`
  - Reason: distance from point to closest segment point now uses shared `distancePointToSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `}`
  - Reason: removed the local `pointSegmentDistance` helper body.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (pointSegmentDistance(point, polygon[index], polygon[(index + 1) % polygon.length]) < radius - EPSILON) return false;`
  - Reason: circle-in-polygon edge clearance now uses shared `distancePointToSegment2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { cleanVec2Loop, finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr, finitePositiveNumber, finiteVec3, v } from "../../core/math.mjs?v=clean-vec2-loop-dry-1";`
  - Reason: bumped core math cache key so the plate API loads `cleanVec2Loop` with shared `distance2`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/geometry.mjs`

## Distance2 Array Usage Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/plate-bend-geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { clamp, finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr, v } from "../../engine/core/math.mjs?v=number-or-dry-1";`
  - Reason: plate bend geometry now uses shared `distance2` for 2D sketch edge lengths.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/plate-bend-geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const length = Math.hypot(dx, dy);`
  - Reason: point-to-point 2D length now uses shared `distance2(a, b)`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/plate-bend-geometry.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const edgeLength = Math.hypot(edge2[0], edge2[1]);`
  - Reason: sketch edge length now uses shared `distance2(a, b)`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { averageVec3, boundsYz, distance3, finiteNumber, linePlaneIntersection, projectPointToPlane, v } from "../../engine/core/math.mjs?v=distance2-dry-1";`
  - Reason: dimension context now imports shared `distance2` for closest-hole sorting.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return [...(pattern.positions || [])].sort((a, b) => Math.hypot(a[0], a[1]) - Math.hypot(b[0], b[1]))[0] || null;`
  - Reason: closest-hole sorting now uses shared `distance2(point, [0, 0])` instead of repeated local `Math.hypot`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { averageVec3, bounds3, bounds3Corners, finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr, validVec3Points, v } from "../../engine/core/math.mjs?v=average-vec3-dry-1";`
  - Reason: viewer radius estimation now imports shared `distance2` for profile and hole-pattern 2D radii.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return Math.max(...points.map((point) => Math.hypot(point[0], point[1])), 1);`
  - Reason: profile radius estimation now uses shared `distance2(point, [0, 0])`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/main.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const patternRadius = Math.max(...(pattern?.positions || [[0, 0]]).map((point) => Math.hypot(point[0] || 0, point[1] || 0)), 1);`
  - Reason: fastener pattern radius estimation now uses shared `distance2`.

## Integer Validation Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/model.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  return uniqueValues(values.filter((value) => Number.isInteger(value) && value >= 0)).sort((a, b) => a - b);`
  - Reason: normalized index filtering now uses shared `finiteNonNegativeInteger` instead of open-coded integer validation.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/webgl/dimension-overlay-ui.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { clamp, finiteNumber, finiteNumberOr } from "../../engine/core/math.mjs?v=number-or-dry-2";`
  - Reason: dimension overlay positive integer parsing now uses shared `finitePositiveInteger`.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/webgl/dimension-overlay-ui.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    return Number.isInteger(first) && first > 0 && Number.isInteger(second) && second > 0`
  - Reason: positive integer pair validation now uses the shared helper for both values.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/webgl/dimension-overlay-ui.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    return Number.isInteger(value) && value > 0 ? value : null;`
  - Reason: positive integer input parsing now uses shared `finitePositiveInteger`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/dimensions/dimension-edit-controller.mjs`

## Array Fallback Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/model.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  return Array.isArray(values) ? values.filter(Boolean) : [];`
  - Reason: `truthyValues` now delegates the shared "array or empty array" fallback to `arrayValues`.

- `bobercad/app/engine/core/model.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  return Array.isArray(values) ? [...new Set(values)] : [];`
  - Reason: `uniqueValues` now delegates the shared "array or empty array" fallback to `arrayValues`.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/panels/panel-elements.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  const source = Array.isArray(value) ? value : [];`
  - Reason: panel array inputs now use shared `arrayValues` for list fallback.

  - Reason: positive validation is now passed as a predicate to `assertOptionalNumber`.

  - Reason: removed the duplicate positive-number assertion wrapper.

  - Reason: replaced two nearly identical optional numeric assertion helpers with one predicate-based helper.

  - Reason: optional numeric null/undefined handling now lives in shared local `assertOptionalNumber`.

## Final Array Fallback Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/geometry/paths.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  const points = (spec.points || []).map((point, index) => vec3(point, `polyline point ${index}`));`
  - Reason: polyline path parsing now uses shared point list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/compliance.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    const tags = new Set(context.tags || []);`
  - Reason: compliance rule tag filtering now uses shared context tag list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/compliance.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    parameterPaths: rule.parameterPaths || (rule.parameterPath ? [rule.parameterPath] : []),`
  - Reason: compliance diagnostics now normalize parameter path lists once and preserve the single-path fallback explicitly.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/compliance.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    objectRoles: rule.objectRoles || [],`
  - Reason: compliance diagnostics now use shared object role list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/compliance.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    resolve: rule.resolve || []`
  - Reason: compliance diagnostics now use shared resolve hint list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/compliance.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  for (const rule of rulePack.rules || []) diagnostics.push(...runRule(rule, context, helpers));`
  - Reason: rule pack execution now uses shared rule list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/solver-result.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  return (result?.diagnostics || []).some((diagnostic) => diagnostic.severity === "error");`
  - Reason: solver error detection now uses shared diagnostics list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-candidates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    const xAxes = grid.axes?.x || [];`
  - Reason: grid snap candidate generation now uses shared X axis list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-candidates.mjs`

  - Reason: grid snap candidate generation now uses shared Y axis list normalization.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { truthyValues, uniqueTruthy } from "../../core/model.mjs?v=truthy-values-dry-1";`
  - Reason: snap composer now imports shared `arrayValues` for construction axis lists.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/snap-composer.mjs`

## Local Wrapper Api Surface Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/geometry/paths.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function tangentAtStation(spec, station) {
      const path = spec.segments ? spec : normalizePath(spec);
      const segment = segmentAtStation(path, station);
      return segment.tangentAt(clamp(station, segment.stationStart, segment.stationEnd) - segment.stationStart);
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unregistered, repo-unused public wrapper; `frameAtStation` now reads the same segment point/tangent once without exposing a dead API function.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/geometry/paths.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `return { origin, ...chooseFrameAxes(tangent, options.up || DEFAULT_UP), station: clamp(station, 0, (spec.segments ? spec : normalizePath(spec)).length) };`
  - Reason: removed duplicate path normalization inside `frameAtStation`; the function already has the normalized path.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/trim-region-keys.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function trimRegionKey(parts) {
      return arrayValues(parts).map(({ planeId, side }) => `${planeId}:${side}`).join("|");
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed a repo-unused exported one-line helper and kept region key formatting local to the only generator that needs it.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/profiles.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function profileCatalog(profiles) {
      return profiles?.profiles || profiles || {};
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed a repo-unused exported wrapper around a trivial catalog fallback; callers now use the fallback expression directly inside the project profile API functions.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function plateOutlineLocalPoints(plate) {
      return sketchPlateOutline(plate);
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed a repo-unused exported wrapper that only forwarded to the shared sketch plate outline API.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/model/trim-region-keys.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function trimRegionMatchesSelector(regionKeyValue, selector) {
      const map = trimRegionSelectorMap(regionKeyValue);
      for (const [planeId, side] of selector) {
        if (map.get(planeId) !== side) return false;
      }
      return true;
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed a repo-unused exported matcher that had only one local caller; the reconcile loop now performs the selector comparison directly.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function plateOutlineWorldPoints(plate, basis) {
      const outline = sketchPlateOutline(plate);
      return outline.map((point) => platePoint(plate, basis, point[0], point[1], 0));
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed a repo-unused exported wrapper with a single local caller; `plateSupportEdge` now computes the world outline where it is consumed.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/work-plane.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `export function globalWorkPlane(project) {`
  - Reason: removed an unused public work-plane export; the global XY plane is an internal fallback for `activeWorkPlane`, not a separate consumed API entrypoint.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/work-plane.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function referencePlaneWorkPlane(project, planeId) {
      const plane = project.model?.referencePlanes?.[planeId];
      if (!plane) return null;
      return {
        id: plane.id,
        label: plane.name || plane.id,
        origin: v.isVec3(plane.origin) ? [...plane.origin] : [0, 0, 0],
        normal: v.safeNorm(plane.normal, [0, 0, 1]),
        axisX: v.safeNorm(plane.localAxisY || plane.axisX, [1, 0, 0]),
        axisY: v.safeNorm(plane.localAxisZ || plane.axisY, [0, 1, 0])
      };
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unused public helper with only one local caller; `activeWorkPlane` now resolves reference-plane state directly and falls back to the internal global plane.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/dependencies.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function affectedTrimJointsForMember(project, memberId) {
      return Object.values(project.model?.trimJoints || {}).filter((trimJoint) => (
        trimJointParticipants(trimJoint).some((participant) => participant.memberId === memberId)
        || trimJointOperations(trimJoint).some((operation) => operation.memberAId === memberId || operation.memberBId === memberId)
      ));
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unused exported filter wrapper with one local caller; `memberDependencyObjectIds` now evaluates affected trim joints directly before collecting dependency IDs.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function referenceRoles(spec) {
      return Object.entries(spec.reference || {})
        .filter(([key, value]) => key.endsWith("Role") && typeof value === "string")
        .map(([, value]) => value);
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unused exported helper that only fed `issueForDimension`; role extraction now lives inside the diagnostic matching function.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function diagnosticPaths(spec) {
      return truthyValues([
        spec.parameter,
        spec.reference?.customParameter,
        spec.reference?.rowsParameter,
        spec.reference?.columnsParameter
      ]);
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unused exported helper that only fed `issueForDimension`; diagnostic path extraction now lives inside the diagnostic matching function.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function dimensionTitle(definition, spec, measured, smartComponent, issue) {
      const title = fullDimensionText(definition, spec, measured, smartComponent);
      return issue?.message ? `${title}\n${issue.message}` : title;
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unused exported one-call helper; `makeDimension` now builds the dimension title where the label is assembled.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/annotations/dimension-context.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function edgeDistanceSign(edge) {
      return edge === "max" ? 1 : -1;
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed a single-use exported helper; `signedEdgeDistance` now keeps the sign rule inside the public distance calculation.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/project/plates.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced:
    ```js
    export function createSketchObject(project, options = {}) {
      const id = nextObjectId(project, options.id || "sketch");
      const sketch = options.sketch || (options.outline
        ? sketchFromOutline(options.outline, id)
        : sketchFromRectangle(options.width || 600, options.height || 300, id));
      return normalizeSketchObject({
        ...options,
        id,
        type: options.type || "plate-sketch",
        sketch,
        center: options.center || [0, 0, 0],
        normal: options.normal || [0, 0, 1],
        localAxisY: options.localAxisY || [1, 0, 0],
        localAxisZ: options.localAxisZ || [0, 1, 0]
      });
    }
    ```
  - Reason: removed an unused public sketch factory with one caller; `addSketch` now builds, normalizes, indexes, and returns the sketch object in one API path.

  - Reason: removed parsing from the deleted intermediate hex body string; parsing now uses the validated full color string directly.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/webgl/colors.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `    parseInt(value.slice(4, 6), 16)`
  - Reason: removed parsing from the deleted intermediate hex body string; parsing now uses the validated full color string directly.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/webgl/colors.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `  return typeof value === "string" && /^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(value) ? value : fallback;`
  - Reason: removed the duplicated `#RRGGBB` regex from `safeHexColor` and reused the shared `HEX_COLOR` validator.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/webgl/webgl-renderer.mjs`

- `bobercad/app/rendering/trim-operation-icons.mjs`

  - Reason: bumped the ESM cache key so trim operation icons reload the shared color validator after the cleanup.

## Path Angular Segment DRY Cleanup

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/geometry/paths.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const radius = requiredFiniteNumber(spec.radius, `segment ${index} radius`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (radius <= EPSILON) fail(`segment ${index} radius must be positive`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const startAngle = requiredFiniteNumber(spec.startAngle || 0, `segment ${index} startAngle`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const endAngle = requiredFiniteNumber(spec.endAngle, `segment ${index} endAngle`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const sweep = endAngle - startAngle;`
  - Removed/replaced: `const radius = requiredFiniteNumber(spec.radius, `segment ${index} radius`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (radius <= EPSILON) fail(`segment ${index} radius must be positive`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const startAngle = requiredFiniteNumber(spec.startAngle || 0, `segment ${index} startAngle`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const endAngle = requiredFiniteNumber(spec.endAngle, `segment ${index} endAngle`);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const sweep = endAngle - startAngle;`
  - Reason: replaced duplicated arc/helix radius-angle-sweep validation with `radialSweep`, keeping arc and helix zero-sweep rules separate while sharing the common path math validation.

- `bobercad/app/engine/api/geometry/paths.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `const normalized = path.segments ? path : normalizePath(path);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const path = spec.segments ? spec : normalizePath(spec);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const path = spec.segments ? spec : normalizePath(spec);`
  - Removed/replaced: `const path = spec.segments ? spec : normalizePath(spec);`
  - Reason: replaced repeated normalized-path ternaries with `normalizedPath`, so all station/sample helpers use one normalization guard.

- `bobercad/app/rendering/scene/build-scene.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `import { normalizePath, samplePath } from "../../engine/api/geometry/paths.mjs?v=final-array-values-dry-1";`

  - Removed/replaced: `selectedMemberId = memberId;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedSmartComponentId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedObjectId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedObjectDetail = null;`
  - Reason: replaced member-selection reset with `setSelectedState({ memberId })`, so selecting a member clears other editor selection state through one helper.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/panels/property-panel.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedMemberId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedSmartComponentId = smartComponentId;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedObjectId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedObjectDetail = null;`
  - Reason: replaced Smart Component selection reset with `setSelectedState({ smartComponentId })`, keeping mutually exclusive editor selection state in one helper.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/panels/property-panel.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedMemberId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedSmartComponentId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedObjectId = objectId;`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedObjectDetail = detail || null;`
  - Reason: replaced object-selection reset with `setSelectedState({ objectId, objectDetail: detail || null })`, so object detail stays coupled to object selection.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/panels/property-panel.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `selectedSmartComponentId = null;`
  - Reason: replaced the Smart Component delete reset with `setSelectedState()`, preventing delete handling from becoming a separate selection-state path.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/panels/property-panel.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (selectedMemberId && !api.project().model.members?.[selectedMemberId]) selectedMemberId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (selectedSmartComponentId && !api.project().model.smartComponentInstances?.[selectedSmartComponentId]) selectedSmartComponentId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced: `if (selectedObjectId && !api.project().objectIndex?.[selectedObjectId]) selectedObjectId = null;`
  - Reason: replaced stale selection cleanup with `setSelectedState()`, so missing selected objects clear all dependent selection detail instead of leaving partial state.

- `bobercad/app/ui/viewer/panels/property-panel.mjs`
  - Removed/replaced 2 occurrences: `selectedMemberId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced 2 occurrences: `selectedSmartComponentId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced 2 occurrences: `selectedObjectId = null;`
  - Removed/replaced 2 occurrences: `selectedObjectDetail = null;`
  - Reason: replaced duplicated Clear button and external `clearSelection` resets with `setSelectedState()`.
